title: CA Exam Registration Window Closes July 19 for Sep/Nov 2026 Exams (Without Late Fee)
content:
# CA Exam Registration Window Closes July 19 for Sep/Nov 2026 Exams (Without Late Fee)

Ek important update hai for all aspiring Chartered Accountants! The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) ne September aur November 2026 session ke Foundation, Intermediate, aur Final examinations ke liye registration window ki important dates announce ki hain.

Agar aap bina late fee ke apply karna chahte hain, toh aaj, **July 19, 2026**, last date hai!

Here are the key dates:

*   **Registration Start Date:** July 6, 2026
*   **Last Date to Apply (Without Late Fee):** July 19, 2026
*   **Last Date to Apply (With Late Fee of ₹600):** July 22, 2026
*   **Application Correction Window:** July 23 to July 25, 2026

Yeh registration September aur November 2026 mein hone wale CA Foundation, Intermediate aur Final examinations ke liye hai. Candidates ko salaah di jaati hai ki woh jaldi se jaldi apna application online ICAI e-Services portal (eservices.icai.org) ke through submit karein, taaki last-minute rush aur technical issues se bacha ja sake.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.icai.org/)

*Published on: 19 July 2026*
